chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2242 of 2021 Applicant: Muhammad Akmal s/o Muhammad Akbar, through Mr. Mir Rafay Ali Shaikh, advocate Respondent: The State, through Mr. Faheem Hussain Panhwar, D.P.G. Complainant: Muhammad Kaleem Khalil, through Mr. Tariq Hussain, advocate. --------------- Date of hearing: 21.03.2022 Date of order: 21.03.2022 --------------- O R D E R ZAFAR AHMED RAJPUT, J:- Through instant Cr. Bail Application, applicant/accused Muhammad Akmal s/o Muhammad Akbar seeks pre- arrest bail in Crime No. 499 of 2020 registered under Section 489-F, 420, 34, P.P.C. at P.S. Gadap City, Karachi. His earlier bail application for the same relief bearing No. 3515 of 2021 was dismissed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV Malir, Karachi vide order, dated 13.09.2021. He was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order, dated 24.11.2021, now the matter is fixed for confirmation of interim bail or otherwise. 2. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection on the confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant, as the alleged offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C. 3. Accordingly, the interim bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 24.11.2021 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE Athar Zai
